text:
On Dec 21, 2006, at 4:40 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of net-mgmt/sendip,
>
> Please note that PR ports/107055 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix

> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/107055


Looks reasonable.
